text:
The rounded area is 113.1. Now, I need to count how many values in the list [78, 70, 87, 85, 36, 16] are greater than 113.1.
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "count_above_threshold", "arguments": {"values": [78, 70, 87, 85, 36, 16], "threshold": "$var2.output_0$"}, "label": "$var3"}]</tool_call_answer>
